title.en: When Ye Tian came out, all forces came to visit...

content.en:
After collecting enough Legendary Blood, Ye Tian came out of the Legendary Realm.

The Legends Realm is of no use to him now, and it is undoubtedly a waste of time to continue to stay inside.

Moreover, he didn't need other means to directly tear apart the barrier of the legendary realm.

......

When Ye Tian came out, all forces came to visit him.

There is no doubt that they all know that Ye Tian has a lot of legendary blood, even if he can't trade the blood of the strongest legend, but if he trades ordinary legendary blood and top-level legendary blood, it is also very good!

Winter Night's Fortress.

Many legends came to Ye Tian's mansion to the Dao Realm, all of them came to visit him, and they actually came to discuss cooperation.

Ye Tian also knew that if he didn't trade at all, it would definitely not work.

So, you have to come up with some of the blood of legends.

"Guys, if you want to trade the blood of legends, it's not impossible. In this way, in exchange for the Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid, a piece of legendary blood requires a hundred drops of Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid, which is not too much, right?"

As soon as Ye Tian's voice fell, many legends left the Dao realm.

None of them have a veteran-level powerhouse behind them, and the elixir to Dao gold liquid needs to be refined by the patriarch himself, and they naturally can't get too much elixir to Dao gold liquid, so naturally they are not qualified to trade the legendary blood in Ye Tian's hands, and it is a waste of time to stay.

"Also, I don't trade with the Qin clan!"

Ye Tian's gaze stared at the legendary Dao realm of the Qin clan, and said lightly.

"Ye Tian, what do you mean by this?"

The legend of the Qin clan reached the Dao realm, and Qin Wuheng said angrily.

There are so many forces, but they don't cooperate with the Qin clan, this is a slap in their face!

"The Qin clan has offended me, is this reason enough?" Ye Tian said coldly: "If you don't leave, I will drive you away!"

Just an ordinary legend to the Dao realm, he can slash it with a wave of his hand.

Qin Wuheng subconsciously retreated, he knew that he was indeed not Ye Tian's opponent, after all, he couldn't defeat a supreme-level legendary-level creature, what else could he do if he didn't leave?

"Hmph, Ye Tian, don't regret it!"

Qin Wuheng ran away.

"Okay, if you take out the elixir to the Dao gold liquid, I will trade with whomever I want. "

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

A group of legends to the Dao realm nodded one after another.

Then.

A Legendary Dao Realm asked, "Ye Tian, can I trade the blood of a top-level legend?"

"No trading for the time being!"

Ye Tian refused.

The blood of the top legend is not very large, and he still wants to keep it for the Terrans!

Moreover, he didn't need anything else now except for the need for the Qiong Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid to improve his cultivation.

Therefore, he will not trade the elixir to the Dao gold liquid.

Subsequently, this group of legends to the Dao realm retreated one after another.

Soon after, there was a legend that the Dao Realm came over with the Qiong Jelly Dao Gold Liquid and traded the legendary blood with him.

Although the Essence of the Dao Gold Liquid is very precious, it is not worth much compared to the blood of legends.

If a patriarch wants to refine the elixir to the Dao gold liquid, he can have as much as he wants, and he can even use it for bathing.

The point is whether these patriarchs are willing to spend time refining.

Therefore, for many forces, there is no shortage of elixir to Dao gold liquid, if there is a real shortage, let the patriarch-level ancestor refine some elixir to Dao gold liquid.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian obtained a large amount of Agar to Dao Gold Liquid.

"These forces are really rich, they have hidden so much Qiong Jelly Dao Golden Liquid, but as a result, the Supreme Heavenly Hall of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance can't exchange a drop of Agar Essence to Dao Golden Liquid!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In fact, there are very few good things that can be exchanged in the Heavenly Temple, and most of them are collected by these forces themselves, and they will not be traded.

Of course, this is also normal.

For example, he is also a member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, he has so much Supreme Legendary Blood, and he doesn't want to take it out and put it in the Supreme Heavenly Temple for other Supreme Dao Realms to exchange for some Eternal Supreme Gold Coins!

Eternal to gold coins, which have no value to him, cannot buy good things.

Use some ordinary resources to exchange the Eternal Solstice Gold Coin for the Essence of the Dao Gold Liquid, which is to do charity.

That's right, this is the elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance doing charity, giving hope to the Supreme Dao Realm with ordinary backgrounds.

Like Su Ya, in fact, he can also exchange the Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid in Su Yu, but the price paid is estimated to be relatively large, and it is easier to spend Eternal Solstice Gold Coin to exchange for Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid in the Supreme Heavenly Temple.

With these Agar Jelly Dao Gold Liquid, Ye Tian's cultivation will improve very rapidly, and he will have enough Agar Jelly Dao Gold Liquid to leave for the Terrans, and in the future, the Terrans' Dao Realms will also be able to exchange the Agar Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid in the Terran Temple, and grow the Terrans step by step.

Unconsciously, the years of the 100,000 solstice era have passed.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through and reached the late stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm.

"Soon, in another two or three hundred thousand Dao eras, my cultivation can definitely break through to the peak realm of the Ninefold Dao Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

......

"Deacon Ye, the application for the name change of the Infinite Domain has been approved!"

A staff member of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance contacted Ye Tian and informed him of the situation.

"It's finally passed!"

Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

A long time ago, he wanted to change the name of the Infinite Domain, after all, the Infinite Heavenly Palace was now a weak force in the Infinite Domain, and it was naturally inappropriate to continue to use the Infinite Domain as its name.

So, he changed it to the Human Domain, and even hyped the name in the Infinity Domain.

Now, many forces have embraced the name.

But after all, the human domain has not yet obtained the population of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

But now, the human domain has been recognized, and the name human domain can also be used externally.

At the same time, all kinds of documents, maps, and logos under the command of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will change the Infinite Domain to a human domain.

......

Human domain.

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

At this time, this group of Supreme Dao Realms of the Wuji Heavenly Palace was also notified, and the Wuji Domain was officially renamed the Human Domain.

"The Infinite Domain is a thing of the past!"

The Sixth Crying Heavenly Venerable muttered.

But fortunately, Ye Tian was already extremely powerful, and he didn't care about their group of ants anymore, otherwise the Wuji Heavenly Palace would have long since ceased to exist.

"Six Heavenly Venerables, the supreme realm of the human race has occupied a territory in our Wuji Heavenly Palace, what should we do?"

A six-fold Dao realm asked.

"Let it out!" said the Sixth Cry Tianzun helplessly.

The human race is now reproducing too fast, every once in a while, it breeds countless clansmen, and there is no shortage of resources, the Dao Realm is constantly born, and now it is the race with the most Dao Realm in the entire human domain.

Even the Terran Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm has given birth to quite a few, and there are even several Eightfold Supreme Dao Realms.

Compared to the human race, they are like ants, how can they resist?

Therefore, the Six Cry Tianzun was also helpless, so he could only endure it.
